# PassNexus
PassNexus is an ultra-modern, lightning-fast digital event pass and ticketing system designed for seamless attendee management.

## Key Features
- Dynamic Quick QR Code Pass Generation
- Multi-tier Roles (VIP, Speaker, Attendee, Exhibitor)
- Native Print layout for downloading robust passes as PDF
- Built-in Analytics & Usage tracking.
- Zero-infrastructure Checkin via unique Gate Checkin URLs.

Built with Next.js 14 App Router, Tailwind CSS, Resend (for beautiful HTML email receipts and OTPs) and Razorpay integration for Organizer tier upgrades.
